auth_notes: Root uses Basic Authentication where the API key is provided as the username and the password field is left blank.
gotchas: Webhook signature verification must be implemented manually using a Crypto/Code node to ensure authenticity.
Policy issuance workflows often require a specific sequence of calls (Quote -> Application -> Policy) which requires careful state management in n8n.
Handling KYC documents requires using the multipart/form-data capability of the HTTP Request node for binary uploads.
research_notes: As no native node exists, the integration must be built using the HTTP Request node. The API is a standard RESTful service. Authentication is simple Basic Auth. The most complex part of the integration will be the multi-step logic for policy lifecycle management and handling asynchronous webhook events for claim updates.
